# Third-party dependencies manifest
#
# Each entry: name | repo URL | ref (tag/branch/SHA) | license | purpose
# Rebuild with: bash scripts/setup_third_party.sh
#
# IMPORTANT: Pin to specific tags for reproducibility. "master"/"main" means
# builds can change silently when upstream pushes new commits.
#
# Last verified: 2026-06-22

basis_universal | https://github.com/BinomialLLC/basis_universal | v2_1_0r     | Apache-2.0 | Texture transcoding (BCn <-> ASTC <-> ETC2)
meshoptimizer   | https://github.com/zeux/meshoptimizer          | v1.1         | MIT         | Mesh simplification (QEM-based)
